subcodes.first_line: This is the Book wherein the Kawthar of Life floweth forth from the hands of the All-Merciful, that He may quicken thereby the peoples of all worlds [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا کتاب ینفق فیه کوثر الحیوان من ایادی الرحمن لیحیین به اهل الاکوان و
subcodes.subjects: @teaching the Cause; call to teach, @chastisement and requital, @rejection by the people of the Bayan, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness
